reviews.review_description: Can't get enough of this game.

Update is a good addition, multi-player is fun, Note: game does lag a times but often or bad enough to affect over all game play.     Controller I'm using the new Steel Series XL<---make sure it's the new one. All games i've played so far on VR works fine. This is not the controller in utube video reviews the is newer and better and tested by me.
Will not install...I have tried downloading 5 times in succession and it keeps saying 'installation failed'...would have been fine if it was a free app but I paid for it! Unbelievably frustrated!

developer_response.body: Hello, This is indeed very unfortunate. With about 3GB of free space you should be able to download then install the game properly. Can you contact us at stephane@ozwe.com so that we look at what is going on ?

reviews.review_description:
Update. Was able to install, only after downloading from web store, NOT VR STORE.

Will try to launch it here in a minute. 

For a bug that big, youd think Cust service would mention it. 


----------



So far i have downloaded this game no less than 10 times and each time it fails to install. Other games, no problems. I contacted their support and after uninstalling everyone occulus related and having then to reinstall everything that worked, the game still didnt install and i was flay out told "their policy is not to provide refunds", like this was something i did. 

Dont pay for this. And buyer beware on anything esle you purchase from the samsung store. Their policy is not to lose cash, even when theyve provided no product or service.  

I'll be disputing this through my credit card company instead. 

GL!
It really socks and just think I paid 10 dollers'the free  is better

This is an experience of a lifetime. I want to thank Samsung so much for allowing me to download this game free.  This is the reason I am always loyal to Samsung. This game is amazingly beautiful and smooth. A true masterpiece.
Probably the best VR game i experienced. Very nice work!!
Addicted to this Game , so much fun , I highly recommend you get this game.

Love this game. (Like a few others, took a few tries to install - I just kept uninstalling other games to give it enough room to install until it finished - but SO worth the effort!) And as a Rift owner as well, just wanted to say thank you for being the only company who hasn't made me buy a game twice to play on both the GearVR and the Rift. The ability to unlock both games with one purchase was awesome. So thank you, really appreciated that. (y)
please add steering controleso to the controler. I don't like having to spin around to play game, I like to relax and play

Best $10 I've spent since buying my Gear VR!  The graphics are great, the game play is exciting as hell... this is what vr gaming should be like.  Just give yourself plenty of room.  I played in a computer chair and slammed myself into a wall more than once.
I wish we had an option for controller users to avoid play on a swivel chair.
This game feels high end. The controls are flawless. This is a perfect example of how games like this should be done. I would pay for another title from this producer in a heartbeat.
Pretty coo

reviews.review_title: The complete package, genuine must have
reviews.review_description: Great  singleplayer variety with environments/scenarios, great multiplayer with super fast hectic combat. Really fun talking to others and theres one map with underground tunnels that are amazing to fly through. One of the very few gearvr titles that feel like a complete package, a complete game. Feel like I ripped the devs off in comparison to other apps.

game plays like gun jack except your moving up down left and right with your head. was interested in the multiplayer part of the game but 0 players were on. didn't enjoy my first experience wish I could refund myself

reviews.review_title: Why is there no SD card install option?
reviews.review_description: Basic requirement for games of any reasonable size!

Das Spiel hat über ein Jahr auf meinem S9+ nicht mehr funktioniert. Bei jedem (!) Spielen stürzte es im 3. Level nach einiger Zeit ab, und man war wieder im Standard Oculus Menü.
Nach dem Update des Smartphones auf Android 10 läuft es wieder.
Daher für dieses coole Spiel genau wie für den Nachfolger wieder die volle positive Bewertung.
The look to steer thing is a bit wierd but the game is fast paced and quite fun, graphics are nice and game play is very smooth on my S7, if you have a Gear you want this game.
Love this game!!
